conversion.description: Optional non-linear conversion; linear/identity use native scale/offset.

oneOf.title: rational
oneOf.description: physical = (numerator polynomial in raw) / (denominator polynomial in raw) + offset. Coefficients are ordered highest power first.

numerator.description: Numerator polynomial coefficients, highest power first (e.g. [a, b, c] = a*raw^2 + b*raw + c).

denominator.description: Denominator polynomial coefficients, highest power first. Must not evaluate to zero over the signal's range.

oneOf.title: table
oneOf.description: Enumerated mapping: the raw value is categorical and rendered via `choices` or `valueTableRef` on the signal. The numeric physical value equals raw.
